deltas._note: Cross-system deltas (vs Zep/Mem0) removed: published competitor numbers are on LongMemEval-S, we measure on LongMemEval-M (m-cleaned). Not directly comparable. See results/SUMMARY.md.

notes: Per-run variance of ~1 pp is normal due to non-determinism of GPT-4o at temperature=0.

Only Test 1 and Baseline run 2 carry complete per-verdict breakdowns in this summary; Test 0 and Baseline run 1 report only the headline accuracy from the paper. The complete raw eval_report.json for those earlier runs is archived but not redistributed (contains verbatim LongMemEval content).
